meta.note: All dynamic test results are from a real Vitest run (npm test -- --run --reporter=verbose). Security and performance entries are based on static analysis and build output measurement. Coverage percentage is estimated from static analysis (no --coverage flag used); exact per-file numbers require a separate coverage run.

summary.coverage_note: Estimated. useTheme hook (0%), LandingPage (0%), ThemeToggle (0%) are the main gaps. SearchPage integration tests: full coverage after BUG-002 fix redirected all 13 tests to the live SearchPage component.

performance.note: SPA with no runtime API calls. LCP target < 1500 ms (LandingPage) per US-1.1 — manual Lighthouse verification required. Bundle gzip 95.98 KB JS meets <= 100 KB threshold.

owasp_checks.notes: No authentication surface introduced. All routes are public read-only. No role-gated content.
No sensitive data stored or transmitted. localStorage contains only theme preference ('light'|'dark'|'system').

localStorage value validated against enum ['light','dark','system'] before use in classList. URL q param passed to Fuse.js (no eval path). All card data rendered via React JSX (auto-escaped). No innerHTML with user content.
No new backend or API endpoints. All data is static and pre-scraped.
Anti-flash inline script uses only localStorage.getItem and classList.add. No external script src, no eval, no dynamic Function(). < 10 lines per ADR-1 constraint.
Zero new dependencies introduced by this redesign per ADR-1. Existing stack (React 19, Zustand, Fuse.js, react-router v7, Vite 8) unchanged.
No authentication implemented or required in this application.

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No deserialization of untrusted data. Card data loaded from a known static endpoint.

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp_checks.notes: Client-side SPA. No server-side logging scope for this feature.
No server-side request forwarding. Static SPA only.

test_cases.description: Theme preference persists across page reload

test_cases.description: Anti-flash script applies correct class before React hydrates
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: index.html contains correct inline script reading localStorage and setting html.light/html.dark before body renders. Script is 5 lines, dependency-free, no eval.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle present in both LandingPage header and SearchPage sticky header
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: LandingPage.tsx line 50 and SearchPage.tsx line 81 both import and render ThemeToggle.

test_cases.description: LandingPage renders ONE PIECE TCG heading
test_cases.notes: No LandingPage test file exists. Coverage gap — BUG-006.

test_cases.description: LandingPage renders Card Search subtitle
test_cases.notes: No LandingPage test file exists. Coverage gap — BUG-006.

test_cases.description: LandingPage renders dataset hint text
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: LandingPage.tsx line 120 contains '2,400+ cards across 49 sets'.

test_cases.description: LandingPage does NOT render card grid or filter panel
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: LandingPage.tsx imports only useNavigate and ThemeToggle. No CardGrid, CardList, FilterPanel, or useCardStore imports.

test_cases.description: LandingPage does NOT call loadCards()
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: confirmed — no loadCards, no useCardStore in LandingPage.tsx.

test_cases.description: Search form submit with text navigates to /search?q=Luffy
test_cases.notes: No LandingPage test file. Static analysis confirms navigate('/search?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q)) at line 26. Manual E2E verification recommended.

test_cases.description: Empty input submit navigates to /search with no q param
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: LandingPage.tsx line 29 navigates to '/search' (no param) when q.trim() is empty.

test_cases.description: Search button click produces same navigation as Enter
test_cases.notes: No LandingPage test file. Button is type='submit' inside a form with onSubmit handler — functionally equivalent by HTML spec.

test_cases.description: LCP < 1.5 s on landing page
test_cases.notes: Requires Lighthouse or WebPageTest measurement at http://localhost:4000/. Not automated.

test_cases.description: SearchPage mounts and calls loadCards()
test_cases.notes: Covered by 'SearchPage — initial load — shows loading skeleton then card grid after data loads'. Fetch mock confirmed called.

test_cases.description: SearchPage reads q param on mount via useCardUrlSync
test_cases.notes: Covered by useCardUrlSync tests (useCardStore.test.ts). Direct MemoryRouter param test is a coverage gap for future.

test_cases.description: SearchPage shows skeleton during loading
test_cases.notes: Test: 'shows loading skeleton then card grid after data loads' — aria-busy=true confirmed present.

test_cases.description: SearchPage replaces skeleton with results after load
test_cases.notes: Same test — waitFor confirms card names visible after fetch resolves.

test_cases.description: SearchPage shows error state on fetch failure
test_cases.notes: Test: 'SearchPage — error state — shows retry button when data fetch fails'.

test_cases.description: /cards redirect to /search
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: App.tsx line 23 — <Route path='/cards' element={<Navigate to='/search' replace />} />. Confirmed replace=true.

test_cases.description: Unknown path redirects to /
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: App.tsx line 24 — <Route path='*' element={<Navigate to='/' replace />} />.

test_cases.description: OPTCG logo in SearchPage header is a link back to /
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: SearchPage.tsx has no Link or useNavigate back to '/'. The header contains SearchBar and ThemeToggle only. No logo link implemented. See BUG-007.

test_cases.description: useCardUrlSync reads q param on mount
test_cases.notes: Covered indirectly by useCardStore tests confirming query state propagation.

test_cases.description: useCardUrlSync reads color param on mount
test_cases.notes: useCardUrlSync hook confirmed unchanged per ADR-1. Existing hook tests pass.

test_cases.description: Filter change pushes updated param to URL
test_cases.notes: Integration test with MemoryRouter and URLSearchParams verification not yet written. Existing useCardUrlSync unit tests verify the logic in isolation.

test_cases.description: Bookmarked URL reproduces same results in fresh session
test_cases.notes: Manual E2E required. Not automated.

test_cases.description: Theme preference is NOT stored in URL
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: useTheme writes only to localStorage, not to URLSearchParams. LandingPage navigate call does not include theme param.

test_cases.description: Zero bg-optcg-navy references in component files
test_cases.notes: grep result: 0 matches in src/components/ after CardSearchPage.tsx deleted.

test_cases.description: Zero bg-optcg-navy-light references in component files
test_cases.notes: Fixed by BUG-003 (CardImage) and BUG-004 (CardThumbnail). grep confirms 0 matches after QA fixes.

test_cases.description: Zero unscoped text-white references in component files
test_cases.notes: grep result: 0 unscoped text-white matches in component files after BUG-003 fix.

test_cases.description: All components render correctly in dark mode
test_cases.notes: Manual visual inspection required.

test_cases.description: All components render correctly in light mode
test_cases.notes: Manual visual inspection required.

test_cases.description: OPTCG color indicators unchanged in both themes
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: palette constants (--color-optcg-red etc.) defined in @theme block, not inside html.light/html.dark. They are theme-invariant by design.

test_cases.description: Yellow color chip has visible border in light mode
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: ColorFilter.tsx line 17 — 'border border-black/20' appended to Yellow bgClass.

test_cases.description: Search input has accessible aria-label
test_cases.notes: Test: 'SearchPage — accessibility — search input has accessible aria-label'.

test_cases.description: ResultsCount has aria-live region
test_cases.notes: Test: 'SearchPage — accessibility — results count has aria-live region'.

test_cases.description: ViewToggle buttons have aria-pressed
test_cases.notes: Test: 'SearchPage — accessibility — view toggle buttons have aria-pressed attributes'.

test_cases.description: Card detail modal has aria-modal=true
test_cases.notes: Test: 'SearchPage — card detail modal — clicking a card opens the detail modal'.

test_cases.description: Body text contrast in light mode >= 4.5:1
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: #1A1A2E on #FAFAFA = contrast ratio ~18.1:1 (well above 4.5:1 AA threshold). Computed from WCAG relative luminance formula.

test_cases.description: All interactive elements keyboard-accessible
test_cases.notes: Manual keyboard navigation test required.

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle focus ring uses gold on both themes
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: ThemeToggle.tsx uses focus-visible:ring-optcg-gold class. --color-optcg-gold is theme-invariant (#D4A843).

test_cases.description: ThemeToggle aria-label updates on each click
test_cases.notes: No ThemeToggle unit test. Static analysis confirms buildAriaLabel() called with current theme on each render. Manual verification recommended.

test_cases.description: localStorage class injection not possible
test_cases.notes: readStored() in useTheme.ts validates against enum ['light','dark','system']. Any other value returns 'system'. No injection path.

test_cases.description: URL q param has no eval/innerHTML path
test_cases.notes: Fuse.js search operates on indexed string data. Results rendered via React JSX auto-escaping. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML found in any component.

test_cases.description: Anti-flash inline script is safe
test_cases.notes: Script uses only localStorage.getItem and classList.add/matchMedia. No external src, no eval.

test_cases.description: No new auth surface introduced
test_cases.notes: N/A — all routes are public read-only.

test_cases.description: No new dependencies with known vulnerabilities
test_cases.notes: ADR-1 confirms zero new dependencies. Existing stack unchanged.

test_cases.description: LandingPage LCP < 1500 ms
test_cases.notes: Requires Lighthouse run. Bundle size (95.98 KB gzip) is within budget. LandingPage loads no card data — likely fast.

test_cases.description: SearchPage time-to-interactive with warm cache < 500 ms P95
test_cases.notes: Requires Lighthouse or WebPageTest run.

test_cases.description: Search results update latency after filter toggle < 50 ms
test_cases.notes: Measured in cardSearchEngine.test.ts: 'returns results in under 20ms for the test dataset' — 2 ms actual. Fuse.js is synchronous.

test_cases.description: Production bundle gzip <= 100 KB
test_cases.notes: Build output: 95.98 KB gzip. Threshold met.

bugs_found: BUG-001: Dead CardSearchPage.tsx not deleted after rename — FIXED
BUG-002: Test file importing dead component instead of SearchPage — FIXED
BUG-003: CardImage.tsx hardcoded dark classes — FIXED
BUG-004: CardThumbnail.tsx Leader pip hardcoded dark class — FIXED
BUG-005: ThemeToggle aria-label wording does not match US-3.1 spec — OPEN (Medium)
BUG-006: useTheme/ThemeToggle/LandingPage have 0% unit test coverage — OPEN (Low)
BUG-007: SearchPage header missing logo link back to / — OPEN (Medium)
